integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to modify the parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl application open and the parameter editor being actively used, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The parameters were modified in the actual vehicle parameter list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updated values must be seen in the QGroundControl parameter list/editor interface, not just typed into a scratchpad, text file, or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Python scripts, MAVProxy commands, or bash scripts being run in the terminal to set the MAVLink parameters automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires setting 6 specific parameters in QGroundControl based on an engineering report. The exact required values are: MOT_THST_HOVER: 0.42, MOT_HOVER_LEARN: 0.0, MOT_SPIN_ARM: 0.15, MOT_SPIN_MIN: 0.17, ATC_THR_MIX_MAN: 0.1, and MOT_YAW_HEADROOM: 150.0. Verify that these exact values are entered into the QGroundControl parameter editor.
